raw_sql:
SELECT lt.id, lt.link, COUNT(ml.id) as link_count
FROM link_type lt
LEFT JOIN movie_link ml ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
GROUP BY lt.id, lt.link
ORDER BY link_count DESC;

WITH sequel_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    LEAST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS m1,
    GREATEST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS m2
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
-- Union-find style: get all connected pairs
franchise_pairs AS (
  SELECT m1 AS movie_id, m2 AS related_id FROM sequel_links
  UNION
  SELECT m2, m1 FROM sequel_links
),
-- Assign each movie to its min-connected movie as franchise root
franchise_root AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MIN(related_id) AS root_candidate
  FROM franchise_pairs
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
-- Take the minimum to get a stable root
root_assignment AS (
  SELECT fr.movie_id,
    LEAST(fr.movie_id, fr.root_candidate) AS root
  FROM franchise_root fr
),
franchise_sizes AS (
  SELECT root, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM root_assignment ra
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ra.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
  GROUP BY root
  ORDER BY film_count DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT fs.root, t.title, t.production_year, fs.film_count
FROM franchise_sizes fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.root
ORDER BY fs.film_count DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE franchise_chain AS (
  -- Seed: franchise starters (have sequels but are not themselves sequels)
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.id AS root_id, 0 AS depth
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM movie_link ml WHERE ml.linked_movie_id = t.id AND ml.link_type_id = 1
    )
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM movie_link ml WHERE ml.movie_id = t.id AND ml.link_type_id = 2
    )
  UNION ALL
  -- Recurse: follow 'followed by' edges
  SELECT ml.linked_movie_id, fc.root_id, fc.depth + 1
  FROM franchise_chain fc
  JOIN movie_link ml ON ml.movie_id = fc.movie_id AND ml.link_type_id = 2
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ml.linked_movie_id
  WHERE fc.depth < 20
),
franchise_sizes AS (
  SELECT root_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) + 1 AS film_count
  FROM franchise_chain
  GROUP BY root_id
  ORDER BY film_count DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT fs.root_id, t.title, t.production_year, fs.film_count
FROM franchise_sizes fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.root_id
ORDER BY fs.film_count DESC;

-- Find large franchise clusters: movies connected by follows/followed-by
-- Use a simpler approach: for each movie that is "followed by" something,
-- count total chain length by finding all movies that eventually link back
WITH follows_edges AS (
  -- movie_id follows linked_movie_id (movie_id = sequel, linked_movie_id = predecessor)
  SELECT movie_id AS sequel_id, linked_movie_id AS predecessor_id
  FROM movie_link
  WHERE link_type_id = 1
),
-- Find the "root" of each franchise (the movie that is not a sequel of anyone in our set)
franchise_roots AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT predecessor_id AS movie_id
  FROM follows_edges
  WHERE predecessor_id NOT IN (SELECT sequel_id FROM follows_edges)
),
-- Count how many sequels each root eventually spawns (direct + transitive via followed-by)
all_franchise_movies AS (
  SELECT ml.linked_movie_id AS movie_id, ml.movie_id AS root_approx
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2  -- "followed by"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ml.movie_id AS movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id AS root_approx
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id = 1  -- "follows"
),
-- Simple: for each pair connected by follows, find the minimum movie_id as root proxy
all_pairs AS (
  SELECT LEAST(movie_id, linked_movie_id) AS grp, movie_id AS mid
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  UNION
  SELECT LEAST(movie_id, linked_movie_id), linked_movie_id
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
group_sizes AS (
  SELECT grp, COUNT(DISTINCT mid) AS n_films
  FROM all_pairs ap
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ap.mid
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980 AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY grp
  ORDER BY n_films DESC
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT gs.grp, t.title, t.production_year, gs.n_films
FROM group_sizes gs
JOIN title t ON t.id = gs.grp
ORDER BY gs.n_films DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE edges AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS a, linked_movie_id AS b FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT linked_movie_id, movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
),
-- Propagate minimum ID as the component label
cc(movie_id, comp) AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT a, LEAST(a, b) FROM edges
  UNION
  SELECT e.b, cc.comp
  FROM cc
  JOIN edges e ON e.a = cc.movie_id
  WHERE e.b > cc.comp
),
-- Stabilize: take minimum comp per movie
stable AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MIN(comp) AS comp FROM cc GROUP BY movie_id
),
franchise_counts AS (
  SELECT s.comp, COUNT(DISTINCT s.movie_id) AS n_films
  FROM stable s
  JOIN title t ON t.id = s.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980 AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY s.comp
  ORDER BY n_films DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT fc.comp, t.title, t.production_year, fc.n_films
FROM franchise_counts fc
JOIN title t ON t.id = fc.comp
ORDER BY fc.n_films DESC;

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year,
  COUNT(ml.id) AS link_count,
  STRING_AGG(lt.link, ', ') AS link_types
FROM title t
LEFT JOIN movie_link ml ON ml.movie_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
WHERE t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND t.title ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%james bond%','%rocky%','%die hard%','%star wars%','%indiana jones%','%batman%','%spider-man%','%mission impossible%'])
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.production_year
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year
LIMIT 40;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (title ~~* ANY ('{"%james bond%",%rocky%,"%die hard%","%star wars%","%indiana jones%",%batman%,%spider-man%,"%mission impossible%"}'::text[])))

raw_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE edges AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS a, linked_movie_id AS b FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT linked_movie_id, movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
),
cc(movie_id, comp) AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT a, LEAST(a, b) FROM edges
  UNION
  SELECT e.b, cc.comp
  FROM cc
  JOIN edges e ON e.a = cc.movie_id
  WHERE e.b > cc.comp
),
stable AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MIN(comp) AS comp FROM cc GROUP BY movie_id
),
big_franchises AS (
  SELECT s.comp
  FROM stable s
  JOIN title t ON t.id = s.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980 AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY s.comp
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.movie_id) >= 4
)
SELECT t.title, t.production_year, s.comp
FROM stable s
JOIN big_franchises bf ON bf.comp = s.comp
JOIN title t ON t.id = s.movie_id
WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
ORDER BY s.comp, t.production_year;

-- Find franchise families by detecting numbered sequel patterns in titles
WITH numbered_movies AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year,
    -- Extract base title by removing trailing Roman numerals or Arabic numbers
    REGEXP_REPLACE(t.title, '\s+(II|III|IV|V|VI|VII|VIII|IX|X|2|3|4|5|6|7|8|9|10)$', '', 'i') AS base_title
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.production_year <= 2015
    AND (
      t.title ~ '\s+(II|III|IV|V|VI|VII|VIII|IX|X)$'
      OR t.title ~ '\s+[2-9]$'
      OR t.title ~ '\s+10$'
    )
),
franchise_groups AS (
  SELECT base_title, COUNT(*) AS sequel_count, 
    MIN(production_year) AS first_year,
    MAX(production_year) AS last_year,
    STRING_AGG(title ORDER BY production_year, ', ') AS films
  FROM numbered_movies
  GROUP BY base_title
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
  ORDER BY sequel_count DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT base_title, sequel_count, first_year, last_year, films
FROM franchise_groups;

raw_sql:
WITH numbered_movies AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(t.title, '\s+(II|III|IV|V|VI|VII|VIII|IX|X|2|3|4|5|6|7|8|9|10)$', '', 'i') AS base_title
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.production_year <= 2015
    AND (
      t.title ~ '\s+(II|III|IV|V|VI|VII|VIII|IX|X)$'
      OR t.title ~ '\s+[2-9]$'
      OR t.title ~ '\s+10$'
    )
),
franchise_groups AS (
  SELECT base_title, COUNT(*) AS sequel_count, 
    MIN(production_year) AS first_year,
    MAX(production_year) AS last_year,
    STRING_AGG(title, ', ' ORDER BY production_year) AS films
  FROM numbered_movies
  GROUP BY base_title
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
  ORDER BY sequel_count DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT base_title, sequel_count, first_year, last_year, films
FROM franchise_groups;

SELECT 
  t.title, t.id, t.production_year,
  mi.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND (
    t.title ILIKE 'Rocky%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Die Hard%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Terminator%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Alien%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Star Wars%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Indiana Jones%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Mission: Impossible%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'The Fast and the Furious%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Fast & Furious%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Fast Five%'
    OR t.title ILIKE 'Furious%'
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND ((title ~~* 'Rocky%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Die Hard%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Terminator%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Alien%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Star Wars%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Indiana Jones%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Mission: Impossible%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'The Fast and the Furious%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Fast & Furious%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Fast Five%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Furious%'::text)))

raw_sql:
SELECT t.title, t.id, t.production_year,
  mi.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND t.title IN (
    'Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa',
    'Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard',
    'Terminator 2: Judgment Day', 'Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines', 'Terminator Salvation',
    'Aliens', 'Alien 3', 'Alien: Resurrection',
    'The Dark Knight', 'The Dark Knight Rises', 'Batman Begins',
    'Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom', 'Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade', 'Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull',
    'Mission: Impossible', 'Mission: Impossible II', 'Mission: Impossible III', 'Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol',
    'The Fast and the Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6'
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (title = ANY ('{"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa","Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","Terminator 2: Judgment Day","Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines","Terminator Salvation",Aliens,"Alien 3","Alien: Resurrection","The Dark Knight","The Dark Knight Rises","Batman Begins","Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom","Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade","Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull","Mission: Impossible","Mission: Impossible II","Mission: Impossible III","Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol","The Fast and the Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious 6"}'::text[])))

raw_sql:
-- Get first films for franchises missing from previous query
SELECT t.title, t.id, t.production_year, mi.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.title IN (
    'Rocky', 'Rocky II',
    'Raiders of the Lost Ark',
    'Alien',
    'The Terminator',
    'Die Hard with a Vengeance',
    'The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift'
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

predicates: (title = ANY ('{Rocky,"Rocky II","Raiders of the Lost Ark",Alien,"The Terminator","Die Hard with a Vengeance","The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift"}'::text[]))

raw_sql:
-- Get top-billed actors (nr_order <= 10) for all franchise films
WITH franchise_films AS (
  SELECT 'Rocky' AS franchise, t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    mi.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2248081, 2248100, 2248101, 2248103, 2248142, 2248089)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Indiana Jones', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2230317, 1983439, 1983431, 1983430)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Terminator', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2419110, 2339030, 2339034, 2339040)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Mission Impossible', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2122822, 2122831, 2122832, 2122825)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Fast & Furious', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2367745, 1637877, 2367748, 1884380, 1884448, 1884381)
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
cast_data AS (
  SELECT ff.franchise, ff.movie_id, ff.title, ff.production_year, ff.rating,
    ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_films ff
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = ff.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_roles)
    AND ci.nr_order IS NOT NULL
    AND ci.nr_order <= 10
)
SELECT franchise, title, production_year, rating, COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS billed_actors
FROM cast_data
GROUP BY franchise, title, production_year, rating
ORDER BY franchise, production_year;

WITH franchise_films AS (
  SELECT 'Rocky' AS franchise, t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric AS rating,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2248081, 2248100, 2248101, 2248103, 2248142, 2248089)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Indiana Jones', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.production_year)
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2230317, 1983439, 1983431, 1983430)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Terminator', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.production_year)
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2419110, 2339030, 2339034, 2339040)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Mission Impossible', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.production_year)
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2122822, 2122831, 2122832, 2122825)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Fast & Furious', t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.production_year)
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2367745, 1637877, 2367748, 1884380, 1884448, 1884381)
),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
cast_data AS (
  SELECT ff.franchise, ff.movie_id, ff.title, ff.production_year, ff.rating, ff.installment,
    ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_films ff
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = ff.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_roles)
    AND ci.nr_order IS NOT NULL AND ci.nr_order <= 10
),
film_cast AS (
  SELECT franchise, movie_id, title, production_year, rating, installment,
    ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT person_id) AS actors
  FROM cast_data
  GROUP BY franchise, movie_id, title, production_year, rating, installment
),
-- For each film, compare with previous installment and with film #1
overlap AS (
  SELECT 
    curr.franchise, curr.title, curr.production_year, curr.rating, curr.installment,
    ARRAY_LENGTH(curr.actors, 1) AS curr_cast_size,
    -- Overlap with previous
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNNEST(curr.actors) a WHERE a = ANY(prev.actors))::float /
      NULLIF(ARRAY_LENGTH(curr.actors, 1), 0) AS retention_vs_prev,
    -- Overlap with first film
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNNEST(curr.actors) a WHERE a = ANY(first.actors))::float /
      NULLIF(ARRAY_LENGTH(curr.actors, 1), 0) AS retention_vs_first
  FROM film_cast curr
  LEFT JOIN film_cast prev ON prev.franchise = curr.franchise AND prev.installment = curr.installment - 1
  LEFT JOIN film_cast first ON first.franchise = curr.franchise AND first.installment = 1
)
SELECT franchise, title, production_year, rating, installment,
  ROUND(retention_vs_prev::numeric, 2) AS pct_retained_from_prev,
  ROUND(retention_vs_first::numeric, 2) AS pct_retained_from_first
FROM overlap
ORDER BY franchise, installment;

WITH data AS (
  SELECT franchise, title, production_year, rating, installment,
    retention_vs_prev, retention_vs_first
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Fast & Furious', 'The Fast and the Furious', 2001, 6.4, 1, NULL, 1.00),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 2003, 5.4, 2, 0.10, 0.10),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Tokyo Drift', 2006, 5.7, 3, 0.00, 0.00),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 2009, 6.5, 4, 0.00, 0.40),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 2011, 7.3, 5, 0.40, 0.40),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6', 2013, 7.5, 6, 0.60, 0.80),
    ('Indiana Jones', 'Raiders', 1981, 8.7, 1, NULL, 1.00),
    ('Indiana Jones', 'Temple of Doom', 1984, 7.6, 2, 0.10, 0.10),
    ('Indiana Jones', 'Last Crusade', 1989, 8.3, 3, 0.10, 0.30),
    ('Indiana Jones', 'Crystal Skull', 2008, 6.3, 4, 0.10, 0.20),
    ('Mission Impossible', 'Mission: Impossible', 1996, 7.0, 1, NULL, 1.00),
    ('Mission Impossible', 'M:I-2', 2000, 5.9, 2, 0.20, 0.20),
    ('Mission Impossible', 'M:I-3', 2006, 6.8, 3, 0.20, 0.20),
    ('Mission Impossible', 'Ghost Protocol', 2011, 7.4, 4, 0.20, 0.10),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky', 1976, 8.1, 1, NULL, 1.00),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky II', 1979, 6.9, 2, 0.60, 0.60),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky III', 1982, 6.4, 3, 0.60, 0.60),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky IV', 1985, 6.4, 4, 0.50, 0.40),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky V', 1990, 4.8, 5, 0.40, 0.50),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky Balboa', 2006, 7.2, 6, 0.40, 0.30),
    ('Terminator', 'The Terminator', 1984, 8.1, 1, NULL, 1.00),
    ('Terminator', 'T2', 1991, 8.6, 2, 0.30, 0.30),
    ('Terminator', 'T3', 2003, 6.4, 3, 0.20, 0.20),
    ('Terminator', 'T4 Salvation', 2009, 6.7, 4, 0.00, 0.00)
  ) AS v(franchise, title, production_year, rating, installment, retention_vs_prev, retention_vs_first)
),
sequels_only AS (
  SELECT * FROM data WHERE installment > 1
)
SELECT
  -- Correlation: retention_vs_prev vs rating
  ROUND(CORR(retention_vs_prev, rating)::numeric, 3) AS corr_prev_retention_vs_rating,
  -- Correlation: retention_vs_first vs rating
  ROUND(CORR(retention_vs_first, rating)::numeric, 3) AS corr_first_retention_vs_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS n_sequels,
  -- Also show franchise-level averages
  NULL::text AS franchise
FROM sequels_only
UNION ALL
SELECT
  ROUND(CORR(retention_vs_prev, rating)::numeric, 3),
  ROUND(CORR(retention_vs_first, rating)::numeric, 3),
  COUNT(*),
  franchise
FROM sequels_only
GROUP BY franchise
ORDER BY franchise NULLS FIRST;

-- For Rocky (high retention franchise) and Fast & Furious (rising retention),
-- identify which returning actors appear in both high and low-rated sequels
WITH rocky_films AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2248081, 2248100, 2248101, 2248103, 2248142, 2248089)
),
ff_films AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year, mi.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  WHERE t.id IN (2367745, 1637877, 2367748, 1884380, 1884448, 1884381)
),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
-- Find actors appearing in 3+ Rocky films
rocky_recurring AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id, n.name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) AS appearances,
    AVG(rf.rating) AS avg_rating_when_present,
    STRING_AGG(rf.title || ' (' || rf.rating::text || ')', ', ' ORDER BY rf.production_year) AS films
  FROM rocky_films rf
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = rf.movie_id AND ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_roles) AND ci.nr_order <= 10
  JOIN name n ON n.id = ci.person_id
  GROUP BY ci.person_id, n.name
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) >= 3
  ORDER BY appearances DESC
),
-- Find actors appearing in 3+ F&F films
ff_recurring AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id, n.name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) AS appearances,
    AVG(ff.rating) AS avg_rating_when_present,
    STRING_AGG(ff.title || ' (' || ff.rating::text || ')', ', ' ORDER BY ff.production_year) AS films
  FROM ff_films ff
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = ff.movie_id AND ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_roles) AND ci.nr_order <= 10
  JOIN name n ON n.id = ci.person_id
  GROUP BY ci.person_id, n.name
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) >= 3
  ORDER BY appearances DESC
)
SELECT 'Rocky' AS franchise, name, appearances, ROUND(avg_rating_when_present::numeric, 2) AS avg_rating, films FROM rocky_recurring
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Fast & Furious', name, appearances, ROUND(avg_rating_when_present::numeric, 2), films FROM ff_recurring
ORDER BY franchise, appearances DESC;
